title: Duty to abide by regulations
doc_html:
§595.  Duty to abide by regulations

Each agency subject to reporting requirements of the bureau shall abide by all rules and regulations adopted by the bureau pursuant to its authority.  

Acts 1981, No. 449, §1, eff. July 1, 1981.
